62756e4b93a93a0717cb164ba54793b35aeee89a: fragment FinanceAccountFields on FinanceAccount { currency description id isActive kind name openingBalanceCents organizationId } query GetFinanceAccounts($organizationId: String!) { financeAccounts(organizationId: $organizationId) { ...FinanceAccountFields } }
07e62fe033c94427ca79d495ca6691b08f6cada2: fragment FinanceTransactionFields on FinanceTransaction { accountId amountCents categoryId currency date description id organizationId reference status type } query GetFinanceTransactions($organizationId: String!) { financeTransactions(organizationId: $organizationId) { ...FinanceTransactionFields } }
27b2a06533d778aa9eeba155f18cff4090675116: fragment OrganizationFields on Organization { address id name userId } query GetOrganizations { organizations { ...OrganizationFields } }
1c511cb73d99c53ba6a89399b513158467082346: fragment StoreFields on Store { address id name organizationId } query GetStoresByOrganization($organizationId: String!) { stores(organizationId: $organizationId) { ...StoreFields } }
6c6f391422e1c2054cf3b1c7f7375d9464a1253f: fragment EmployeeFields on Employee { address id name organizationId salary } query GetEmployeesByOrganization($organizationId: String!) { employees(organizationId: $organizationId) { ...EmployeeFields } }
